TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Pasing, title = Pasing, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pasing} }

S.FORM: alang Pasing ga niya mki sku Taycyo Si atu Wahe'i go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 376 buwan, 966 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 42% kyan ku 410 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 58% kyan ku 556 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 39%, Amis 2%, Bunun 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Pasing hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Pasing hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Pasing hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pasing hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Pasing hya' ga S'yux. tay 'llaw na Pasing hya' ga Lilang. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Pasing ga niya mki sku Taycyo Si atu Wahe'i go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 376 buwan, 966 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 42% kyan ku 410 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 58% kyan ku 556 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 39%, Amis 2%, Bunun 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Pasing hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Pasing hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Pasing hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pasing hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Pasing hya' ga S'yux. tay 'llaw na Pasing hya' ga Lilang. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč pas~…ēiŇč …£a nija mki s~…ēku taj ¶~ ®jo s~…ēi atu wańße Ēi …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, tajan **%, amis~…ē *%, ő≤unun *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran, Ňčas~…ēal ps~…ēatu te…£ami ru pqniqan iju. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na pas~…ēiŇč ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj Ēzil na pas~…ēiŇč ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na pas~…ēiŇč ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na pas~…ēiŇč ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkraja Ē na pas~…ēiŇč ńßja Ē …£a s~…ē Ējux. taj Ēllaw na pas~…ēiŇč ńßja Ē …£a lilaŇč. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
